brief_notes: Solid single-pass paper. nRF values (0, 0.05, 0.17, 0.23, 0.36, 1.00, 0.00), tool versions (RAxML 8.2.4, Jellyfish 2.2.4), hardware (i7-7700 3.60GHz), p=5000 all consistent. Honest 'not reported' placeholders for runtime/memory. Algorithm pseudocode included. Inline bibliography is well-formatted with many references.
